comment: Almost all the features that were once available for free are now available only on Spotify premium, n for the most part I Am not bothered but the thing that bothers me is that I can't even choose a song after some point of time.
the function of activity: The activity involves searching, library function, playing/pausing items, viewing downloaded songs/podcasts, downloading songs or podcasts, adding to playlists, shuffling a playlist, connecting to devices, previewing episodes, type replies to episodes and accessing history page, setting page
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Profile', 'description': 'View profile'}, {'name': 'Content filters', 'description': 'Apply filters to content'}, {'name': 'Play', 'description': 'Play the currently selected item'}, {'name': 'Pause', 'description': 'Pause the currently playing item'}, {'name': 'Add to Liked Songs', 'description': 'Add the music to liked songs by clicking plus sign.'}]

operations.event: click<button id=107 class ="com.spotify.music:id/premium_tab" alt="Premium, Tab 4 of 4">  </button>
